languages.text: "Будьте осторожны, Лорд-капитан". {n}Абеляр сосредоточенно всматривается в очертания герба, упрямо нахмурив лоб.{/n} "Династические тайны могут оказаться весьма небезопасными. Сопроводить вас внутрь — мой праведный долг сенешаля".

"Be careful, Lord Captain." {n}Abelard narrows his eyes at the outline of the coat of arms, his brows furrowed stubbornly.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous. It is my righteous duty as Seneschal to escort you inside."
languages.original_text: "Будьте осторожны, Лорд-капитан". {n}Абеляр сосредоточенно всматривается в очертания герба, упрямо нахмурив лоб.{/n} "Династические тайны могут оказаться весьма небезопасными. Сопроводить вас внутрь — мой праведный долг сенешаля".

traits.locale_text: "Be careful, Lord Captain." {n}Abelard narrows his eyes at the outline of the coat of arms, his brows furrowed stubbornly.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous. It is my righteous duty as Seneschal to escort you inside."

"Be careful, Lord Captain." {n}Abelard narrows his eyes at the outline of the coat of arms, his brows furrowed stubbornly.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous. It is my righteous duty as Seneschal to escort you inside."

"Be careful, Lord Captain." {n}Abelard narrows his eyes at the outline of the coat of arms, his brows furrowed stubbornly.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous. It is my righteous duty as Seneschal to escort you inside."

languages.text: «Tenga cuidado, Lord Capitán». {n}Abelard entrecierra los ojos en dirección al escudo heráldico y frunce el ceño.{/n} «Los secretos de la dinastía pueden ser bastante peligrosos. Como Senescal, es mi deber escoltarle al interior».
languages.original_text: "Be careful, Lord Captain." {n}Abelard narrows his eyes at the outline of the coat of arms, his brows furrowed stubbornly.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous. It is my righteous duty as Seneschal to escort you inside."

traits.locale_text: «Tenga cuidado, Lord Capitán». {n}Abelard entrecierra los ojos en dirección al escudo heráldico y frunce el ceño.{/n} «Los secretos de la dinastía pueden ser bastante peligrosos. Como Senescal, es mi deber escoltarle al interior».

languages.text: “请务必小心，舰长大人。”{n}阿贝拉德眯起双眼看着那家徽的轮廓，眉头顽固地紧锁着。{/n}“王朝的秘密往往伴随着巨大的危险。身为总领，陪同您进入是我的职责。”
languages.original_text: "Be careful, Lord Captain." {n}Abelard narrows his eyes at the outline of the coat of arms, his brows furrowed stubbornly.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous. It is my righteous duty as Seneschal to escort you inside."

traits.locale_text: “请务必小心，舰长大人。”{n}阿贝拉德眯起双眼看着那家徽的轮廓，眉头顽固地紧锁着。{/n}“王朝的秘密往往伴随着巨大的危险。身为总领，陪同您进入是我的职责。”

languages.text: « Soyez {mf|prudent, seigneur-capitaine|prudente, seigneure-capitaine}. » {n}Les yeux plissés, Abélard observe les contours du blason en fronçant les sourcils d'un air obstiné.{/n} « Les secrets de la dynastie ne sont pas toujours sans danger. En tant que sénéchal, j'ai le devoir de vous escorter à l'intérieur. »
languages.original_text: "Be careful, Lord Captain." {n}Abelard narrows his eyes at the outline of the coat of arms, his brows furrowed stubbornly.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous. It is my righteous duty as Seneschal to escort you inside."

traits.locale_text: « Soyez {mf|prudent, seigneur-capitaine|prudente, seigneure-capitaine}. » {n}Les yeux plissés, Abélard observe les contours du blason en fronçant les sourcils d'un air obstiné.{/n} « Les secrets de la dynastie ne sont pas toujours sans danger. En tant que sénéchal, j'ai le devoir de vous escorter à l'intérieur. »

languages.text: "Dikkatli olalım Lord Kaptan." {n}Kaşlarını inatla çatan Abelard, armanın dış hatlarına gözlerini kısarak bakıyor.{/n} "Hanedanlık sırları, tehlikeli olmaktan çok daha fazlası olabilir. Size içeriye kadar eşlik etmek, Seneşal olarak haklı vazifemdir."
languages.original_text: "Be careful, Lord Captain." {n}Abelard narrows his eyes at the outline of the coat of arms, his brows furrowed stubbornly.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous. It is my righteous duty as Seneschal to escort you inside."

traits.locale_text: "Dikkatli olalım Lord Kaptan." {n}Kaşlarını inatla çatan Abelard, armanın dış hatlarına gözlerini kısarak bakıyor.{/n} "Hanedanlık sırları, tehlikeli olmaktan çok daha fazlası olabilir. Size içeriye kadar eşlik etmek, Seneşal olarak haklı vazifemdir."

languages.text: 「お気をつけください、キャプテン様。」{n}アベルは紋章の輪郭を鋭く見つめ、眉をひそめた。{/n}「王家の秘密は、少し危険なだけでなく、非常に危険です。私は、あなたの護衛を、執事として、正義の義務として行います。」
languages.original_text: "Be careful, Lord Captain." {n}Abelard narrows his eyes at the outline of the coat of arms, his brows furrowed stubbornly.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous. It is my righteous duty as Seneschal to escort you inside."

traits.locale_text: 「お気をつけください、キャプテン様。」{n}アベルは紋章の輪郭を鋭く見つめ、眉をひそめた。{/n}「王家の秘密は、少し危険なだけでなく、非常に危険です。私は、あなたの護衛を、執事として、正義の義務として行います。」

languages.text: "Seid vorsichtig, Lord Captain." {n}Abelards Augen verengen sich zu Schlitzen, als er das Wappen stirnrunzelnd betrachtet.{/n} "Dynastische Geheimnisse können ausgesprochen gefährlich sein. Es ist meine rechtschaffene Pflicht als Truchsess, Euch hinein zu begleiten."
languages.original_text: "Be careful, Lord Captain." {n}Abelard narrows his eyes at the outline of the coat of arms, his brows furrowed stubbornly.{/n} "Dynastic secrets can be more than a little dangerous. It is my righteous duty as Seneschal to escort you inside."

traits.locale_text: "Seid vorsichtig, Lord Captain." {n}Abelards Augen verengen sich zu Schlitzen, als er das Wappen stirnrunzelnd betrachtet.{/n} "Dynastische Geheimnisse können ausgesprochen gefährlich sein. Es ist meine rechtschaffene Pflicht als Truchsess, Euch hinein zu begleiten."
